description: Control test: full Puppeteer solver with Chrome's real tdc.js
purpose: Confirm real Chrome tdc.js still produces accepted tokens (errorCode 0)

runs.notes: First attempt succeeded on first try. Slide CAPTCHA served, not click.
Second attempt succeeded on first try. Different tdc.js build served (130006 chars vs 162790).
Third attempt succeeded on first try. Yet another tdc.js build size (132906 chars).

conclusion: All 3 runs returned errorCode 0 (success) with valid tickets. The CAPTCHA type is still 'slide' (not click). This confirms that Chrome's real tdc.js generates accepted collect tokens. The standalone token generator's errorCode 9 rejection is therefore caused by the standalone collect token, not by any server-side change. Notable: Tencent served 3 different tdc.js builds across 3 runs (162790, 130006, 132906 chars), confirming active template rotation.
